title: cyclosorus subappendiculatus
intro: Cyclosorus subappendiculatus, also known as the subappendiculate fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus subappendiculatus include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as being used as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and processed into teas, infusions, and decoctions for use in traditional medicine.
